nasb.text: and two turtledoves or two young pigeons which are within his means, the one shall be a sin offering and the other a burnt offering.

esv.text: also two turtledoves or two pigeons, whichever he can afford. The one shall be a sin offering and the other a burnt offering.

cnv.text: 又要按他的經濟能力，拿兩隻斑鳩或是兩隻雛鴿，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭。

ccb.text: 还要按自己的能力献两只斑鸠或雏鸽，一只作赎罪祭，一只作燔祭。
